_source: Lemettinen et al. (2019) + Fichtner et al. (2019) + Dreyer et al. (2016)
delta_ec_note: HSE06 DFT reference, Dreyer et al. (2016) Phys. Rev. B 93, 081205
delta_p_note: Fichtner (2019) SP + strain-PE estimate at GaN lattice mismatch
sigma_2deg_note: Derived from delta_P/e; HEMT literature range 1-3e13 cm-2
references: Lemettinen et al. (2019) Cryst. Growth Des. 19, 4020
Fichtner et al. (2019) J. Appl. Phys. 125, 114103
Dreyer et al. (2016) Phys. Rev. B 93, 081205
